# Copilot Instructions

Use the Firebase MCP server for Firebase-related tasks in this repository.

Official references:

- Firebase MCP server: https://firebase.google.com/docs/ai-assistance/mcp-server
- Firebase agent skills: https://firebase.google.com/docs/ai-assistance/agent-skills
- Model Context Protocol docs: https://modelcontextprotocol.io/

When the repo gains a `firebase.json`, you can extend the MCP server config with a `--dir` argument to bind the server to that Firebase project directory.
